pageDescription: Frequently asked questions about OWA therapies, memberships, bookings, and club guidelines.

faqs.question: What is OWA?
faqs.answer:
OWA is Mexico City's first wellness club designed as a disciplined ecosystem for restoration,
clarity, and long-term wellbeing. It is not a spa and not a fitness studio--OWA unites essential
therapies, advanced technology, and restorative spaces to help you reset and realign
consistently.

faqs.question: How is OWA different from a spa or gym?
faqs.answer:
A spa offers momentary relaxation. A gym focuses on performance. OWA provides core
practices that regulate your body and mind. It's a place built for rhythm and discipline, not
just indulgence.

faqs.question: Do I need prior experience to visit?
faqs.answer:
No. Every therapy is designed for both beginners and experienced practitioners. Our team
guides you through every step.

faqs.question: Can I combine multiple therapies in one visit?
faqs.answer:
Yes. Depending on your membership or pass, you will be able to book a complete visit. You can
refer to the memberships section for more details.

faqs.question: How do I contact OWA?
faqs.answer:
You can reach our team at contact@owaclub.com or via WhatsApp at +52 XX XXXX XXXX. We
are available 7 days a week from 7:00 AM to 9:00 PM.

faqs.question: What are your hours?
faqs.answer: OWA is open 7 days a week, from 7:00 AM to 9:00 PM.

faqs.question: Is parking available?
faqs.answer: Street parking is available in the area.

faqs.question: What should I bring?
faqs.answer:
Just comfortable clothing and a swim suit. OWA provides towels, sandals, robes, showers, and
lockers.

faqs.question: Can I come straight from work?
faqs.answer: Yes. We offer full amenities so you can transition in and out of your day easily.

faqs.question: Is there a code of conduct?
faqs.answer:
OWA is a quiet, contemplative environment. Guests are asked to keep conversations low,
silence devices, and respect the guidelines of each room.

faqs.question: Who should consult a doctor before booking?
faqs.answer:
We recommend prior medical approval for individuals with:
  • Cardiovascular conditions
  • Uncontrolled high blood pressure
  • Pregnancy
  • Chronic respiratory issues
  • Pacemakers or medical implants
  • Any pre-existing medical condition

faqs.question: What are the benefits of the sauna?
faqs.answer: Detoxification, stress relief, improved circulation, skin vitality, and enhanced muscle recovery.

faqs.question: How long is a sauna session?
faqs.answer:
A standard social session is 60 minutes. Within that time, individual sauna rounds typically last
15-20 minutes, alternating with cool-down periods. Private sessions are 90 minutes. Listen to
your body and take breaks as needed.

faqs.question: Is there a social sauna and a private sauna?
faqs.answer:
Yes.
  • Social Roof Top Sauna: up to 13 guests.
  • Private Sauna: cabins for 1-6 guests.
Both allow you to unwind at your own pace.

faqs.question: What should I know before entering?
faqs.answer:
Stay hydrated, avoid alcohol beforehand, and leave the room if you feel lightheaded or
uncomfortable. Sessions are flexible, never forced.

faqs.question: What temperature is the cold plunge?
faqs.answer: Typically between 4 C and 10 C.

faqs.question: How long should I stay in?
faqs.answer: Most guests stay 1-3 minutes, especially during their first attempts.

faqs.question: Is it safe for beginners?
faqs.answer:
Yes. Our team guides you in breathing, posture, and timing for a safe and empowering
experience.

faqs.question: What are the benefits?
faqs.answer: Improved circulation, reduced inflammation, mental clarity, elevated mood, and immune support.

faqs.question: What is the Zero Gravity Chair?
faqs.answer:
A weightless relaxation experience that reduces physical tension, improves circulation, and
induces deep calm.

faqs.question: How long does it last?
faqs.answer: Around 10-30 minutes.

faqs.question: What does it feel like?
faqs.answer: Lightness, release of tension, and a gentle drop into restorative rest.

faqs.question: What are the benefits of the Zero Gravity Chair?
faqs.answer:
• Reduces spinal pressure: By elevating the legs and aligning the body at a neutral angle, the chair decompresses the spine, easing tension in the lower back and supporting overall postural alignment.
  • Relieves joint and muscle tension: The weightless position distributes body weight evenly, reducing pressure on joints and allowing muscles to relax without effort.
  • Improves circulation: Raising the legs above heart level supports venous return and helps oxygenate tissues more efficiently, leaving the body feeling lighter and energized.
  • Promotes deep relaxation: The reclined, supported posture activates the parasympathetic nervous system, helping the body shift out of stress responses and into restorative calm.
  • Encourages restorative sleep: Because it reduces physical discomfort and calms the nervous system, many people enter a meditative or sleep-like state during the experience.
  • Supports recovery: Lower physical tension plus improved circulation supports faster recovery from fatigue, workouts, and everyday stress.
  • Enhances mental clarity: The deep state of rest improves focus and leaves the mind refreshed, similar to a short restorative nap.

faqs.question: What is Shiftwave?
faqs.answer:
Shiftwave is a sound therapy technology that delivers low-frequency vibrations through a
specialized lounger. The body absorbs therapeutic sound waves that promote deep nervous
system relaxation, reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and accelerate physical
recovery. Sessions are immersive, silent to the outside, and deeply calming.

faqs.question: How long is a Shiftwave session?
faqs.answer: Shiftwave sessions are 20-30 minutes.

faqs.question: Is Shiftwave included in my membership?
faqs.answer:
Shiftwave sessions are included in SIGNATURE (2/month) and BLACK (4/month) memberships.
CORE members and Drop In guests can book Shiftwave sessions at the member or guest rate.

faqs.question: What is pressotherapy?
faqs.answer: A dynamic compression treatment that stimulates lymphatic flow, circulation, and detoxification.

faqs.question: What are the benefits?
faqs.answer:
• Reduces water retention and swelling: Pressotherapy stimulates the lymphatic system through rhythmic compression, helping the body mobilize excess fluid and reduce swelling in the legs, abdomen, and arms.
  • Improves lymphatic drainage: Sequential pressure patterns support the natural movement of lymph, helping clear metabolic waste, reduce stagnation, and support immune function.
  • Boosts circulation and metabolic flow: By promoting blood flow in the extremities, pressotherapy enhances oxygen and nutrient delivery to tissues and supports faster recovery.
  • Enhances post-workout recovery: The compression mimics many benefits of sports massage, decreasing soreness, reducing inflammation, and accelerating recovery after training.
  • Supports detoxification: Improved lymphatic movement helps flush toxins and metabolic byproducts more efficiently.
  • Improves skin tone and elasticity: Better circulation and reduced fluid retention can improve skin texture, tone, and elasticity over time.
  • Promotes deep relaxation: The gentle rhythmic compression helps the body shift into a restorative parasympathetic state.
  • Provides a non-invasive contouring support option: Pressotherapy can support shaping effects by reducing excess fluid and improving tissue health, without pain, needles, or downtime.

faqs.question: Is it invasive?
faqs.answer: No. It is gentle, external, and non-invasive.

faqs.question: What is the Rhino Kit? Is it the same as pressotherapy?
faqs.answer:
Yes. At OWA, the pressotherapy treatment is performed using the Rhino Pro 3 system -- a
professional dynamic compression device. You may see it referred to as Rhino Kit in the Drop In
menu. It is the same service.

faqs.question: What's the difference between Core, Signature, and Black?
faqs.answer:
• Core: 8 social sessions/month (60 min) + 10% discount on specialized services.
  • Signature: 10 social sessions/month (60 min) + 2 private sessions (90 min) + 2 Shiftwave sessions (30 min) + 15% discount on specialized services.
  • Black: 12 social sessions/month (60 min) + 4 private sessions (90 min) + 4 Shiftwave sessions (30 min) + 20% discount on specialized services.
Each tier includes monthly social sauna sessions and discounts on specialized services. Higher tiers add private sauna and Shiftwave sessions. Specialized therapies (hyperbaric chamber, acupuncture, massage, biomagnetism, and pressotherapy) are available as add-ons or at a member discount.

faqs.question: Do visits include all therapies?
faqs.answer:
Visits include the therapies listed under each membership tier. Some premium therapies may
require separate booking.

faqs.question: Do unused visits roll over?
faqs.answer:
All membership sessions reset monthly. Unused sessions do not carry over to the following
month.

faqs.question: Is there a minimum commitment?
faqs.answer: Monthly memberships can be cancelled with prior notice. No long-term contracts required.

faqs.question: Can I share my membership?
faqs.answer: No. Memberships are individual to preserve quality, availability, and rhythm within the club.

faqs.question: What are the membership prices?
faqs.answer: Core: $5,000 MXN/mes - Signature: $7,500 MXN/mes - Black: $9,000 MXN/mes

faqs.question: How do I cancel my membership?
faqs.answer:
Memberships can be cancelled with at least 30 days' notice before your next billing date. To
cancel, get in touch with our team at contact@owaclub.com or WhatsApp +52 55 XXXX XXXX.

faqs.question: Can I pause or cancel my membership?
faqs.answer: Contact our team at least 7 days before your next billing cycle to arrange a pause.

faqs.question: Do I need to be a member to visit OWA?
faqs.answer:
No. Drop In passes are available for individual visits, no membership required. Visit our booking
platform or contact us to book.

faqs.question: How do I book a therapy?
faqs.answer: Through our website booking platform or directly with our front desk team.

faqs.question: What happens if I arrive late?
faqs.answer:
Sessions begin on time. Late arrivals may result in shortened sessions to respect the schedule
of other guests.

faqs.question: What is your cancellation policy?
faqs.answer:
Sessions must be cancelled at least 12 hours before the scheduled start time. Late
cancellations may result in a fee or loss of session credit.

faqs.question: Can I bring guests?
faqs.answer: Yes, depending on your membership tier. Guests must register and follow club guidelines.

faqs.question: How far in advance can I book a session?
faqs.answer: Sessions can be booked up to 30 days in advance through our website booking platform.

faqs.question: Can I reschedule a session?
faqs.answer:
Yes. Sessions can be rescheduled up to 12 hours before the start time at no charge. Contact
our team or use the booking platform to make changes.
